# Merzato source provenance

The assembler, validator and error modules in this directory come from `Pepitodrop/merzato-lang` version 1.0.1 at commit `d555a1ebdeb45fdbb84b6df7124c811209846059`.

They are used under the included MIT license. SignalChord supplies its own restricted browser execution adapter for Policy Studio and does not include Merzato's general browser host.
